creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #8)

OK, I've attached a file "typescript" created with script(1).

When you replay it with script -p, there is what appears like a "pause" between
 
"# git clone -q ssh://anongit@git.freebsd.org/ports.git ports" 

and the end of the output finally showing the error because -q was used and the link is on the slow side, and it's a full clone. The "pause" lasts about 12 mins.

The vm was a pristine installation created from FreeBSD-13.1-STABLE-amd64-20230127-df8c42f5ad12-254170-bootonly.iso.xz (from https://download.freebsd.org/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/13.1/FreeBSD-13.1-STABLE-amd64-20230127-df8c42f5ad12-254170-bootonly.iso.xz ) a few hrs ago.

All my reporting of this has been on either 13.1-p3 or 13-stable. I've not tried -current yet.
